source_basis.basis_note: This audit layer does not re-parse the EPUB. It copies compact location fields from the v0 location map and connects them to v1 candidate and ability judgments.

candidate_screen.title: 第一性原理成本拆解

v1_cross_context.evidence: Appears in general method, SpaceX rocket cost, Mars payload/cost threshold, and appendix law summary.

v2_predictive_power.evidence: Can guide new expensive/impossible-seeming technical or cost problems by separating physical floor, material cost, and historical pricing.

v3_distinctiveness.evidence: More specific than generic rational analysis because it asks for material/physics/cost floors and gap diagnosis.

candidate_screen.boundary: Not a substitute for professional safety, legal, financial, medical, or domain engineering review; missing data must remain assumptions.

candidate_screen.title: 算法之道

v1_cross_context.evidence: Supported by organization design, process simplification, and appendix law summary.

v2_predictive_power.evidence: Can guide new process/meeting/automation decisions by forcing demand questioning and deletion before acceleration.

v3_distinctiveness.evidence: Distinctive sequence: question, delete, simplify, accelerate, automate; it warns against automating waste.

candidate_screen.boundary: Cannot delete safety, compliance, ethical, privacy, financial-control, user-trust, or health protections as if they were normal waste.

candidate_screen.title: 工厂即产品 / 制造即护城河

v1_cross_context.evidence: Supported by engineering value, manufacturing bottleneck, factory-as-product, and manufacturing moat locations.

v2_predictive_power.evidence: Can guide hardware, infrastructure, operations, and platform-scale delivery problems by mapping the delivery system itself.

v3_distinctiveness.evidence: The core move is not merely 'manufacturing matters' but treating the factory/delivery system as a designed product.

candidate_screen.boundary: Not suitable for forcing industrialization during early exploration; quality, safety, maintainability, and people costs remain hard gates.

candidate_screen.title: 文明风险优先级

v1_cross_context.evidence: War, regulation, AI, natural hazards, and multiplanet arguments form a repeated risk-priority cluster.

v2_predictive_power.evidence: Can help separate local risk from civilization-scale risk, but cannot decide policy or technical truth without external evidence.

v3_distinctiveness.evidence: Distinctive because it links company choices to civilization-scale risk reduction and planetary redundancy.

candidate_screen.boundary: Cannot treat Musk's positions as proven facts; high-risk AI, population, regulation, energy, and multiplanet claims need external review.

candidate_screen.title: 直接沟通和坏消息反馈

v1_cross_context.evidence: Strong in organization chapters, weaker outside organization context.

v2_predictive_power.evidence: Can diagnose blocked cross-team problems by identifying information owner, decision owner, and shortest accountable path.

v3_distinctiveness.evidence: Direct communication is common; distinctiveness comes from linking it to product defects and whole-company goals.

candidate_screen.boundary: Must preserve legal approval, confidentiality, responsibility, decision records, and safety review; not a license for chaos or pressure.

candidate_screen.title: 极度紧迫感和并行处理

v1_cross_context.evidence: Appears in speed, parallel processing, and crisis work examples.

v2_predictive_power.evidence: Can shorten timelines when dependencies are real and feedback is fast; unsafe when deadlines are fictional.

v3_distinctiveness.evidence: Urgency is common; stronger part is treating time as scarce and exposing parallelizable work.

candidate_screen.boundary: Cannot turn crisis intensity into normal management; must account for health, quality, safety, and truthful schedule commitments.

candidate_screen.title: 目标选择：重要且至少可能

v1_cross_context.evidence: Value creation, future-oriented domains, company progress, and Tesla mission support the pattern.

v2_predictive_power.evidence: Can filter projects by importance and feasibility, but cannot objectively settle personal life choices.

v3_distinctiveness.evidence: Mission-driven work is common; distinctive part is high expected future impact even at low probability.

candidate_screen.boundary: Must not become life-coach rhetoric or grand-narrative permission to ignore opportunity cost, externalities, or failure bearers.

candidate_screen.title: 69 项核心马斯克法则整体

v1_cross_context.evidence: The appendix is a compressed list that mixes methods, values, cases, and slogans.

v2_predictive_power.evidence: As a whole list it cannot give stable steps for a new problem; individual items must be split and re-validated.

v3_distinctiveness.evidence: Many items are compressed common advice or summaries of earlier chapters.

candidate_screen.boundary: Use only as an index or candidate discovery pool, not as a ReaderLab-approved method package.

candidate_screen.title: 单纯拼命工作 / 每周一百小时

v1_cross_context.evidence: Crisis intensity appears in multiple execution scenes, but the transferable mechanism is responsibility, feedback, and bottleneck solving.

v2_predictive_power.evidence: Work hours alone cannot guide a new problem without causing harmful overgeneralization.

v3_distinctiveness.evidence: Hard work as a slogan is not distinctive and is unsafe to normalize.

candidate_screen.boundary: Can be discussed as crisis case material only; not a default organization principle or skill.

candidate_screen.title: 共情力并非资产 / 物理学不在乎感情

v1_cross_context.evidence: Evidence is clustered around truth-seeking, engineering reality, and organizational feedback rather than a full people-management method.

v2_predictive_power.evidence: It can protect technical facts from emotional distortion but cannot guide complex organization governance by itself.

v3_distinctiveness.evidence: The expression is vivid, but its vividness creates misuse risk.

candidate_screen.boundary: Only usable as a boundary warning: facts matter. It must not justify crude management, harassment, or ignoring long-term talent costs.

candidate_screen.title: 多行星叙事整体

v1_cross_context.evidence: The book repeatedly links multiplanet goals to civilization redundancy, transport cost, and Mars city feasibility.

v2_predictive_power.evidence: Ordinary readers cannot trigger a stable execution workflow from the whole civilization thesis.

v3_distinctiveness.evidence: Distinctive as a Musk/SpaceX civilizational frame, but not directly skillable.

candidate_screen.boundary: Keep as macro case and risk narrative; extract only cost, manufacturing, and risk-boundary reasoning where applicable.

ability_candidates.title: 第一性原理可行性拆解
ability_candidates.trigger: User faces a technical, product, or cost problem widely described as impossible, too expensive, or never done before.
steps: Write the default judgment and the analogy behind it.
Decompose the problem into physical, material, energy, time, cost-floor, and capability constraints.
Estimate theoretical floors or hard limits.
Compare current reality against the floor and explain the gap.
Return possible, impossible, or needs-validation with minimum validation actions.
ability_candidates.boundary: Does not replace professional safety, legal, medical, financial, or domain engineering review.
ability_candidates.not_formal_skill_reason: No standalone prompt, tests, output eval, or source-grounded schema has been implemented for this ability.

ability_candidates.title: 算法之道流程瘦身
ability_candidates.trigger: User has a slow, heavy, expensive, or over-automated process, approval chain, meeting routine, code path, production step, or delivery workflow.
steps: Question each requirement and identify its requester.
Delete unnecessary parts, steps, meetings, code, or approvals.
Simplify the remaining system.
Accelerate the critical path.
Automate only after deletion and simplification.
Create a re-add gate for deleted items.
ability_candidates.boundary: Safety, compliance, ethics, privacy, financial controls, user promises, and irreversible production steps cannot be deleted as normal waste.
ability_candidates.not_formal_skill_reason: Ability lacks an executable template, deterministic validator, output eval case, and adversarial misuse tests.

ability_candidates.title: 最短沟通路径与组织边界诊断
ability_candidates.trigger: Cross-team problems stall, decisions distort through hierarchy, or product/process defects mirror organizational boundaries.
steps: Draw the current communication chain and waits.
Identify who owns the facts, decision, and consequences.
Propose the shortest accountable communication path.
Check whether product/process artifacts reveal organization-boundary defects.
Define one real issue for a trial run.
ability_candidates.boundary: Cannot bypass legal approval, confidentiality, HR discipline, safety responsibility, record keeping, or required authorization.
ability_candidates.not_formal_skill_reason: Needs near-neighbor boundaries against unsafe escalation, harassment, and unauthorized decision paths before becoming a Skill.

ability_candidates.title: 交付系统瓶颈定位
ability_candidates.trigger: Prototype works, but manufacturing, deployment, operations, supply chain, quality, or stable delivery cannot scale.
input: interfaces between design, engineering, manufacturing, or operations
steps: Draw the delivery system as the product.
Mark throughput, waits, defects, and accountable owner for each step.
Identify the system bottleneck.
Check whether design and delivery are separated in a way that delays feedback.
Output actions such as deletion, parallelization, front-line proximity, interface reset, or supplier change.
ability_candidates.boundary: Do not force industrialization in early exploration; do not trade away safety, quality, maintainability, or people costs.
ability_candidates.not_formal_skill_reason: Needs test cases across manufacturing, software platform, and knowledge-work delivery before formalization.

ability_candidates.title: 单一核心指标反馈回路
ability_candidates.trigger: Team works hard but cannot tell if progress is improving; discussions scatter across too many metrics.
input: causal hypothesis between metric and result
steps: Define the one most important improvement direction for this phase.
Choose one core metric that represents progress.
Check repeatability, actionability, and gaming risk.
Put it at the first screen or first paragraph of team sync.
Review metric movement against actions and replace the metric if it fails.
ability_candidates.boundary: Cannot collapse multi-objective public policy, ethics, safety, quality, or user harm into one metric.
ability_candidates.not_formal_skill_reason: Evidence is narrower than the other abilities and needs additional cases and metric-misuse tests before promotion.

unresolved.reason: This v1 package is a repo-internal manual sample; no human reading acceptance has been recorded.
Ability candidates are structured, but no SKILL.md, trigger eval, output eval, tests, or misuse review exists.
v1 now has an independent audit JSON with heading/block/char refs copied from v0 location map, but it is not a formal v1 source-grounded contract generated from fresh parsing.
A human reviewer still needs to spot-check location refs, candidate decisions, and ability boundaries against the EPUB and original contexts.
Civilization-risk, AI, regulation, population, energy, and multiplanet claims cannot be validated from this book alone.
